positive: An ethereal, whimsical woodland gathering featuring bioluminescent mushrooms, glowing fireflies, and silhouetted figures interacting with oversized fantasy flora. The style is neo-art nouveau fantasy etching mixed with vibrant vaporwave neon elements. Focus on intricate linework and strong silhouette contrasts against deep nocturnal blues, emerald greens, and electric violet highlights. Composition should be circular and centered, ensuring the main subject matter is visible on all four sides for apparel printing. Studio shot, high contrast, dramatic rim lighting, photorealistic digital painting, symmetrical composition, vector-art quality.
